page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Permutable feature fusion network for drug-drug synergy prediction.
PermuteDDS takes multiple representations of drugs and cell lines as input and employs a permutable fusion mechanism to combine drug and cell line features.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary:
Permutable feature fusion network for drug-drug synergy prediction.
PermuteDDS takes multiple representations of drugs and cell lines as input and employs a permutable fusion mechanism to combine drug and cell line features.
